SUBJECT : Intentional Withholding of Material Statement PLEASE READ THE CITIBANK CASE FILES IN SEQUENCE ( Each file is numbered and titled for clarity. Volumes build upon each other and are best understood in order. ) This is Volume XXXX of a XXXX, XXXX documented sequence detailing systemic Citi misconduct. 

In this Volume, I relay how Citi has withheld to this day my requested XX/XX/year> statement, which would have shown my {$4000.00} credit refund. By omitting that statement, a billing period with clear activity, Citi continues to obstruct transparency and conceal critical account information.
